text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Satono Diamond talking to a
friend in the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Satono! Did you hear about that strange
creature that appeared in the field?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Strange creature? No, I haven't heard anything
about it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There are rumors going around saying it was a
cryptid—the famous Humungo Argentum Cicada
Dragon!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...A-are you okay? You're not reacting like you
usually would...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, yes, I'm fine! Sorry. I just zoned out a little
bit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd have never imagined such a subdued reaction
from the ever inquisitive Satono Diamond...
Perhaps revising her race schedule would ease her
fatigue.
